docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BUSTAMANTE, MARIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2018 BY JPT MICHAEL MAU; ONLY PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT SHE IS SWORN AND EXAMINED; JPT: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY BUSTAMANTE, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROGERS, LEE HEARING SET FOR JUN-11-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY LEE ROGERS IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUL-16-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEE ROGERS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUSTAMANTE, MARIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUSTAMANTE, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROGERS, LEE $400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED MAR-13-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, LEE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER ROGERS, LEE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JULY 16, 2018. NO APPEARANCES, THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
